creator: pgiffuni@fps.biblos.unal.edu.co
text:
I changed the location of the icons to a more standard path, in the 
hope that some filemanager or window manager will find them easier.
I also changed the COMMENT, which was wrong since only XPM3 icons are
available.

Fix: 

Patch to the port is available in 
ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/incoming/hobbes.dif
(Patch was too big, 3000+ paths changed!)
How-To-Repeat: One thing I didn't fix was remove the bazillion directories generated in
the PLIST. I'm not sure these should be deleted, though.
